data.name: Robust and Generalized Humanoid Motion Tracking
LEGS: Fine-Tuning Teleop-Free VLAs for Humanoid Loco-manipulation in an Embodied Gaussian Splatting World
미니배치 최적 수송을 활용한 플로우 기반 생성 모델의 개선 및 일반화
BifrostUMI: Bridging Robot-Free Demonstrations and Humanoid Whole-Body Manipulation
VR 기반 인간-로봇 협업 시뮬레이션에서 GPT 기반 대형 언어 모델을 활용한 가변 자율성 탐구

data.description: Improving and Generalizing Flow-Based Generative Models with Minibatch Optimal Transport cites or references BifrostUMI: Bridging Robot-Free Demonstrations and Humanoid Whole-Body Manipulation.
Improving and Generalizing Flow-Based Generative Models with Minibatch Optimal Transport cites or references Robust and Generalized Humanoid Motion Tracking.
Improving and Generalizing Flow-Based Generative Models with Minibatch Optimal Transport is based on or uses Flow matching.

Improving and Generalizing Flow-Based Generative Models with Minibatch Optimal Transport cites or references LEGS: Fine-Tuning Teleop-Free VLAs for Humanoid Loco-manipulation in an Embodied Gaussian Splatting World.
